Here are the generated images based on your detailed instructions. The characters and art style strictly follow your feedback, with the two Orca brothers, Port and Starboard, rendered in the high-fidelity 2D vector, Sanrio-esque aesthetic of your reference images.

### **1\. Port (Round Eyes)**

This image shows Port, the pragmatic brother, running the sushi counter. His design features the friendly, round black eyes as specified.

### **![Image][image1]2\. Starboard (Star Eyes)**

This image depicts Starboard, the visionary brother. He is rendered with his distinctive star-shaped eyes and an energetic pose, maintaining the consistent visual style.

### **![Image][image2]3\. The Brothers Together**

This final image shows the duo dynamic, with both giant Orca brothers behind the counter. Their large scale relative to the tiny bunny customers is clearly depicted, fulfilling your specific request.
